name: Green Beans with Tomatoes and Honey
recipeIngredient: 1 lb green beans, trimmed, cut crosswise into 1/2 inch pieces
1 can (16 oz) plum tomatoes, drained and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the green beans in a vegetable steamer with water. Steam until the beans turn very bright green but are still crunchy, about 5 minutes.
2. Rinse the beans under cold running water in the steamer basket and drain.
3. Heat olive oil in a wide shallow saucepan. Add onion and garlic; saute until softened for about 5 minutes.
4. Add cinnamon, cumin, black pepper, and cayenne; saute for 1 minute.
5. Add tomatoes and 1/2 teaspoon salt. Bring to boiling, stirring frequently to prevent sticking, for 8-10 minutes, until thickened to a jam-like consistency.
6. Stir in honey and lemon juice. Add the beans. Cover; lower heat; cook at low simmer, stirring occasionally, until beans are tender, about 15 minutes.
7. Stir in lemon juice if desired. Season with remaining salt if needed.
